/************************* SAM Documentation **********************************************************************
* SummaryMetricRemoteWorkHistory
* Date: 9/12/2025
* Author: 

* Business Owner / SME:  BI Support Services
* Primary Support Contact:  BI Support Services
* Secondary Support Contact: 

****************************************************************************************************************
** Change History
****************************************************************************************************************
**PR    Date            Author          Description
* 01		09/12/2025	    Tyler Snook		New entity created - request from Miranda Nguyen and Tracy Hamilton to have a historical records use in Labor Management PowerBI dashboard
				09/15/2025				            Added Exclusion logic - KRN contracts would need to be active only until 5/31/24 month when UKG go-live was completed.
* 02	  10/01/2025	    Tyler Snook		Now has companyCD for context join.
* 03   10/14/2025      Tyler Snook   SR readded SourceDSC
***************************************************************************************************************/

SELECT
	MonthStartDTS,
	MonthEndDTS,
	EmployeeID,
	EventFromEffectiveDTS,
	EventToEffectiveDTS,
	RemoteWorkDSC,
	CompanyCD,
	SourceDSC
FROM
(
	SELECT
		sc.MonthStartDTS,
		sc.MonthEndDTS,
		e.EmployeeID,
		e.EventFromEffectiveDTS,
		e.EventToEffectiveDTS,
		e.EventCodeDSC as RemoteWorkDSC,
		e.CompanyCD,
		e.SourceDSC,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EmployeeID, MonthStartDTS ORDER BY EventToEffectiveDTS, CompanyCD DESC) as rn
	FROM Shared.Reference.StandardCalendar sc
		JOIN SAM.LaborManagement.MetricRemoteWorker e
			ON e.EventFromEffectiveDTS <= sc.MonthEndDTS
				AND e.EventToEffectiveDTS >= sc.MonthStartDTS
	WHERE year(sc.MonthStartDTS) > year(DATEADD(yyyy, -15, GETDATE())) and eomonth(sc.DateDTS) <= eomonth(getdate())
) z
WHERE rn=1
